channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hackers are still exploiting the cPanel bug to gain control of thousands of websites
item.description: Days after the disclosure of a critical vulnerability in popular web hosting software cPanel and WHM, hackers keep targeting and hacking websites.

item.title: What is the release date for Half Man episode 3 on HBO Max and BBC iPlayer?
item.description: Two weeks in and I'm still struggling to watch Richard Gadd's latest TV show. But when does Half Man episode 3 drop on HBO Max and BBC iPlayer?

item.title: Forget GPUs — China unveils 2 ExaFLOPS supercomputer using only CPUs, packing 47,000 processors into 92 compute cabinets as it looks to supersede the US once again
item.description: China’s Lingsheng supercomputer aims for exascale performance using a CPU-only architecture, though its claims remain unverified for now.

item.title: Notre top 3 des smartphones de mai 2026 : la guerre du milieu de gamme
item.description: Début du mois rime avec « top » chez Frandroid. Le mois passé a en effet encore été intéressant et nous avons vu défiler un paquet de smartphones. Lesquels ont remporté nos faveurs ?

item.title: Best Mother’s Day Deals on Mom-Approved Gifts (2026)
item.description: Give Mom the best and save some cash in the process with these legitimate discounts on WIRED-approved gifts.

item.title: GameStop (yes, that GameStop) wants to buy eBay for $56 billion
item.description: Meme stock king GameStop is looking to acquire another online retail giant of old: eBay.

item.title: Mini Motorways is letting players vote for its next city map
item.description: The traffic management sim will include the new area later this year.

item.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
item.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

item.title: Le propriétaire de Micromania veut s’offrir eBay pour 55 milliards, malgré une capitalisation 4 fois plus petite
item.description: GameStop, l'enseigne qui possède Micromania, vient de proposer 55,5 milliards de dollars pour racheter eBay. Une boîte qui pèse quatre fois plus que lui.

item.title: The creator of Roomba is back with a furry robot companion
item.description: Colin Angle, the maker of the Roomba and the man who helped put 50 million household robots into people's homes, is back with a new robot. But this one is designed as a companion, not a cleaner. The first robot from Angle's new company, Familiar Machines & Magic, is a dog-sized robotic pet that resembles […]

item.title: A study shows that cellphone bans didn't improve US students' test scores
item.description: However, students reported improvements in overall well-being in later years.

item.title: The Pixel 11 could be the next victim of the RAM shortage
item.description: Google's next round of Pixel phones could be a downgrade compared to the Pixel 10 lineup due to the ongoing RAM shortage. Leaked specs for the Pixel 11 lineup shared by MysticLeaks include a possible starting configuration with only 8GB of RAM, rather than the current 12GB, as Android Headlines reports. According to MysticLeaks, Google […]

item.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
item.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

item.title: The Mashable favorite Dreame FP10 air purifier is on sale at Amazon for $75 off
item.description: The Dreame FP10 air purifier is on sale at Amazon for $424.99, down from the list price of $499.99. That's a 15% discount.

item.title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
item.description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America."

item.title: 'This is the robot I wanted to build forever': former iRobot chief on his extraordinary 'Familiar' AI companion
item.description: Former Roomba maker Colin Angle returns to the robot game and talks to us about his new "Familiar", a robot that looks like but is not a bear.

item.title: Kill Switch : c’est quoi cet outil VPN et pourquoi est-il vital de l’activer ?
item.description: Le Kill Switch n'est pas un interrupteur pour faire exploser toutes les Nintendo Switch aux alentours, mais bien une fonctionnalité propre aux VPN. Une technologie qui est une sorte de bouton d'arrêt d'urgence et qui s'applique à la connexion Internet. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir à son sujet.

item.title: La nouvelle stratégie fédérale sur l’IA sera dévoilée « très prochainement »
item.description: La nouvelle stratégie du gouvernement fédéral en matière d’intelligence artificielle (IA) tiendra compte des répercussions de cette technologie sur le marché du travail, a indiqué lundi le ministre de l’Intelligence artificielle et de l’Innovation numérique, Evan Solomon.

item.title: The best Star Wars Day deals
item.description: May the Fourth be with us all on this Star Wars Day. While things have been relatively quiet with the multimedia gold mine that is Star Wars, with just some murmurs about upcoming movies (The Mandalorian and Grogu excluded), a lone live-action show on the horizon, and a long way to the release of the […]

item.title: The best Star Wars Day deals, drops, and freebies for May the 4th
item.description: You don't have to be a Star Wars fan to appreciate a good sale. Here are the best May the 4th deals, freebies, and new drops to shop right now.

item.title: Mistral Medium 3.5 : la start-up française dégaine un modèle 128B open source à moitié prix de Claude, mais 2 points derrière
item.description: Mistral sort Medium 3.5, un modèle 128 milliards de paramètres open source à 1,50 dollar le million de tokens entrants. C'est moins cher que Claude Sonnet 4.6, c'est aussi un peu moins bon.

item.title: Instructure data breach: ShinyHunters says it stole data and private messages from 275 million teachers and students
item.description: Hacking group ShinyHunters has claimed responsibility for another recent data breach, this time at edtech giant Instructure.
